Summary: Design schema and create baseline migrations
Description: Create core tables: scholarship, source, scrape_run, user_profile, match_score, notification_event. Add indexes for deadlines, country, and status.

Summary: Build source adapter base and retry strategy
Description: Implement a reusable adapter contract with fetch parse validate map lifecycle, plus retry backoff with jitter.
Connect first scholarship source, parse records, and store canonical fields.
Connect second source and ensure records are normalized with same quality rules.
Prevent duplicate scholarships and normalize inconsistent values across sources.
Implement /start and collect profile preferences with validation.
Enable profile review, updates, and notification pause or resume.
Rank opportunities by profile fit and store explanation reasons.
Deliver digest and urgent notifications from ranked matches.
Prevent duplicate and excessive sends with seen-item and cooldown logic.

Summary: Automate scheduled jobs and run history
Description: Schedule scrape match notify workflows and keep run history.
Add structured logs metrics and alert thresholds for critical failures.
Increase confidence with unit and integration tests across core flows.
Ensure env token handling and rotation process are production-safe.
Document release process validation gates and recovery path.
